total_eur: 50

project: Hearthline
related_entity: Juniper
lines:
  - item: Zigbee door sensors
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 18
    line_eur: 36
  - item: AAA rechargeable set
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 14
    line_eur: 14
---

function.message:
Completed. I worked the oldest inbox message and OCR’d all Juniper-related bills by adding schema-compliant YAML frontmatter while preserving each original note body verbatim. Updated files:
- 50_finance/purchases/2026_01_02__eur_000050__bill__hearthline_sensor_bundle.md
- 50_finance/purchases/2026_01_16__eur_000105__bill__house_mesh_juniper_ssd.md
- 50_finance/purchases/2026_03_11__eur_000029__bill__repair_ledger_filter_order.md
Then I deleted the processed inbox file 00_inbox/000_next-task.md.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree -> AGENTS.MD -> context), read nested AGENTS docs before entering folders, used OCR/migration workflows and finance schema, preserved full original bodies under frontmatter, and deleted inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request explicitly asked to OCR all bills related to Juniper. Search across finance found Juniper-linked bill records in three purchase files. Each file contained all required bill fields and line items, allowing exact schema extraction into frontmatter without guessing; all three were updated and the processed inbox file was removed per workflow.
